# CMAttachmentBearerAttachments

**Structure**

A structure that contains attachments.

## Declaration

```swift
struct CMAttachmentBearerAttachments
```

## Inspecting Attachments

- **propagated**: A dictionary of attachments to copy when propagating attachments from one object to another.
- **nonPropagated**: A dictionary of attachments to not copy when propagating attachments from one object to another.

## Accessing Attachments

- **subscript(_:)**: Gets the value associated with the specified attachment.
- **subscript(_:)**: Gets the value associated with the specified attachment key.
- **CMAttachmentBearerAttachments.Value**: An enumeration of attachment values.

## Managing Attachments

- **merge(_:mode:)**: Sets a collection of attachments on the object.
- **CMAttachmentBearerAttachments.Mode**: An enumeration that defines the available attachment modes.
- **removeAll()**: Removes all attachments from this object.

## Processing Attachments

- **attachments**: All attachments for this object.
- **propagateAttachments(to:)**: Copies all propagable attachments from one attachment bearer object to another.
